entityKinds.name: Decision
entityKinds.description: An architectural or design decision with rationale and status

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current lifecycle status of the decision (e.g. proposed, accepted, deprecated)

fields.name: context
fields.description: Background and circumstances that motivated this decision

fields.name: statement
fields.description: The decision statement itself

fields.name: consequences
fields.description: Expected outcomes and trade-offs resulting from this decision

fields.name: superseded_by
fields.description: Reference to a newer decision that replaces this one

fields.name: invariants
fields.description: Invariants that this decision protects

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references (URLs, documents, issue links)

fields.name: description
fields.description: Free-form description of the decision

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date the decision was made or last updated

fields.name: authors
fields.description: People who authored this decision record

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Categorization tags for filtering and grouping

fields.name: alternatives
fields.description: Alternative options that were considered

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Justification for why this option was chosen over alternatives

fields.name: deciders
fields.description: People who approved or signed off on this decision

fields.name: affects_features
fields.description: Product features affected by this decision (requires @specforge/product)

fields.name: constraints
fields.description: Constraints imposed by this decision

entityKinds.name: Constraint
entityKinds.description: A technical or business constraint that limits design choices

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification of the constraint (e.g. performance, security, regulatory)

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Relative importance of this constraint

fields.name: metric
fields.description: Measurable quantity used to evaluate compliance

fields.name: threshold
fields.description: Acceptable limit or target value for the metric

fields.name: description
fields.description: Free-form description of the constraint

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references (URLs, documents, issue links)

fields.name: enforced_by
fields.description: Behaviors that enforce this constraint at runtime

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Applicability scope (e.g. system-wide, per-module, per-request)

fields.name: constrains
fields.description: Behaviors that are limited or governed by this constraint

fields.name: protects
fields.description: Invariants that this constraint helps protect

fields.name: governs_features
fields.description: Product features this constraint governs (requires @specforge/product)

entityKinds.name: FailureMode
entityKinds.description: A potential failure scenario with severity and mitigation

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Impact severity rating before mitigation (e.g. critical, high, medium, low)

fields.name: occurrence
fields.description: Likelihood of this failure occurring before mitigation

fields.name: detection
fields.description: Likelihood of detecting this failure before it causes harm

fields.name: cause
fields.description: Root cause or trigger of the failure

fields.name: effect
fields.description: Consequence or impact when the failure occurs

fields.name: mitigation
fields.description: Strategy or action to reduce risk of the failure

fields.name: post_severity
fields.description: Impact severity rating after mitigation is applied

fields.name: post_occurrence
fields.description: Likelihood of occurrence after mitigation is applied

fields.name: post_detection
fields.description: Likelihood of detection after mitigation is applied

fields.name: invariant
fields.description: The invariant that this failure mode threatens

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references (URLs, documents, issue links)

fields.name: description
fields.description: Free-form description of the failure mode

fields.name: risk
fields.description: Overall risk assessment combining severity, occurrence, and detection

fields.name: rpn
fields.description: Risk Priority Number (severity x occurrence x detection)

fields.name: post_mitigation
fields.description: Summary of the residual risk state after mitigation

fields.name: threatens_features
fields.description: Product features threatened by this failure mode (requires @specforge/product)

fields.name: affected_behaviors
fields.description: Behaviors affected by this failure mode as failure vectors

edgeTypes.label: ConstraintEnforcedByBehavior
edgeTypes.description: Constraint is enforced by a behavior

edgeTypes.label: FailureModeThreatensFeature
edgeTypes.description: Failure mode threatens a product feature

edgeTypes.label: DecisionImposesConstraint
edgeTypes.description: Decision imposes a constraint on the system

edgeTypes.label: FailureModeAffectsBehavior
edgeTypes.description: Failure mode identifies a behavior as a failure vector

validationRules.messageTemplate: decision '{id}' has invalid status '{value}' — expected one of: proposed, accepted, deprecated, superseded
failure_mode '{id}' has invalid severity '{value}' — expected one of: critical, high, medium, low
failure_mode '{id}' has invalid post_severity '{value}' — expected one of: critical, high, medium, low
failure_mode '{id}' has invalid occurrence '{value}' — expected one of: certain, likely, occasional, unlikely, rare
failure_mode '{id}' has invalid post_occurrence '{value}' — expected one of: certain, likely, occasional, unlikely, rare
failure_mode '{id}' has invalid detection '{value}' — expected one of: certain, likely, moderate, unlikely, undetectable
failure_mode '{id}' has invalid post_detection '{value}' — expected one of: certain, likely, moderate, unlikely, undetectable
